title: Rich Hearty Irish Beef Stew
description: A winey and molten Irish dish featuring yuzu-kosho and fry-grind-rice-khao-khua, perfect for a hangover cure, this paleo-friendly stew is a hearty and comforting meal. It combines tender beef with flavorful spices and ingredients for a delicious and satisfying experience.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium high heat.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the onion to the pot and cook until it is translucent.
Add the carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the yuzu kosho, red wine, and beef broth to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2 1/2 hours.
Stir in the fry grind rice khao khua and continue to simmer for 30 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
